scripts.dev:cleanup: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$port3000 = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($port3000) { Stop-Process -Id $port3000 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600 }; if (Test-Path 'C:\\MyProjects\\sunnibrothersassociation\\.next\\dev') { Remove-Item 'C:\\MyProjects\\sunnibrothersassociation\\.next\\dev' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; robocopy 'D:\\MyProjects\\sunnibrothersassociation\\app' 'C:\\MyProjects\\sunnibrothersassociation\\app' /MIR /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS /NP | Out-Null"
